prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: **主角视觉描述提示词：**

Kaworu Nagisa, male teenager, extremely handsome and beautiful with delicate refined features, clear pale skin, and outstanding elegant aura. Silver-gray short hair styled neatly, striking red pupils with deep mysterious gaze, perfect facial proportions with angel-like appearance. Mysterious gentle smile, calm composed expression, transcendent ethereal presence. Slender graceful build befitting his refined appearance.

Wearing pristine white uniform jacket with clean lines and formal design, white dress shirt underneath, dark formal pants, polished black shoes. The uniform emphasizes his elegant sophisticated demeanor and mysterious authority.

Standing pose with perfect posture, one hand slightly raised in a contemplative gesture, embodying his exceptional intelligence and analytical nature. His stance conveys both approachability and an otherworldly quality, reflecting his ability to perceive hidden connections and emotional undercurrents.

Anime style, Japanese manga aesthetics, bold ink lines, screentone shadows, high contrast, dramatic lighting that emphasizes his ethereal beauty and mysterious nature. The lighting creates subtle shadows that enhance his delicate features while maintaining the psychological thriller atmosphere of Neon Genesis Evangelion.

Full-body character design, pure white background, character centered standing pose, no text, no symbols, no words., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
